source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析7》

segments.text: Hello, everyone!
segments.translation: 大家好！

segments.text: I'm Hazel, the guide from Travelite Agency.
segments.translation: 我是Travelite旅行社的导游Hazel。

segments.text: Since we mentioned the trip to Muna Island in the last program, we've received several online messages from those who have been there.
segments.translation: 自从我们在上一期节目中提到穆纳岛之旅后，就收到了几位去过那里的人发来的网络留言。

segments.text: As a result, we've collected some helpful dos and don'ts for new visitors, which will hopefully help you to know the island better and enjoy your stay to the fullest!
segments.translation: 因此，我们为初次到访的游客整理了一些实用的注意事项，希望能帮助大家更好地了解这座岛，并充分享受在岛上的时光！

segments.text: The first suggestion is about tips.
segments.translation: 第一条建议与小费有关。

segments.text: Although tipping is required in most circumstances in Muna Island, the amount you should give differs significantly.
segments.translation: 尽管在穆纳岛的大多数情况下都需要给小费，但具体金额差别很大。

segments.text: If you take a taxi, there is no set rate on how much you should leave to the driver.
segments.translation: 如果您乘坐出租车，给司机多少小费并没有固定标准。

segments.text: Someone may give a generous tip if he thinks the service is fantastic.
segments.translation: 如果有人认为服务非常好，可能会给一笔丰厚的小费。

segments.text: It's up to you entirely.
segments.translation: 这完全由您自己决定。

segments.text: However, if you go to the hairdresser's or enjoy a meal in a restaurant and the bill comes with no service charge, a 10% tip is advisable.
segments.translation: 不过，如果您去理发店，或在餐厅用餐而账单中没有服务费，建议给10%的小费。

segments.text: Muna Island has got relatively good medical service.
segments.translation: 穆纳岛的医疗服务相对不错。

segments.text: If you get sick, the quickest way is to ask the hotel to arrange an English-speaking doctor for you, but remember it's not a complimentary service.
segments.translation: 如果您生病了，最快的办法是请酒店为您安排一位会说英语的医生，但要记住，这项服务并不是免费的。

segments.text: The other alternative is to visit the local clinic, and you have to prepare for the charge as well.
segments.translation: 另一种选择是去当地诊所就诊，您同样要准备支付费用。

segments.text: I should remind you that the medical service on the island can be pricey, so it's better to buy your insurance before you leave.
segments.translation: 我得提醒大家，岛上的医疗服务可能很昂贵，所以最好在出发前购买保险。

segments.text: When you visit Muna Island, you'll see the notice nearly everywhere: tap water is safe to drink.
segments.translation: 游览穆纳岛时，您几乎到处都能看到这样的告示：自来水可以安全饮用。

segments.text: But you might not get used to its weird taste because it contains minerals.
segments.translation: 但由于水中含有矿物质，您可能不习惯它那种奇怪的味道。

segments.text: In this case, you can buy bottled water sold in every shop, but you'd better make sure the sealed lid is untouched, as the locals often put tap water into the bottle.
segments.translation: 在这种情况下，您可以买到每家商店都有售的瓶装水，但最好确认密封瓶盖没有被动过，因为当地人经常把自来水装进瓶子里。

segments.text: Then I'll focus on transportation in Muna Island.
segments.translation: 接下来我会重点介绍穆纳岛的交通。

segments.text: The bus is the most commonly used means of transportation for local residents.
segments.translation: 公交车是当地居民最常使用的交通工具。

segments.text: Although there aren't many bus lines, they're always on time.
segments.translation: 虽然公交线路不多，但公交车总是准时。

segments.text: However, some people complained that the road was so bumpy that they even got nausea and dizziness.
segments.translation: 不过，有些人抱怨道路太颠簸，甚至会感到恶心和头晕。

segments.text: As a result, it's not a good choice if you want to sit peacefully and relax on the way.
segments.translation: 因此，如果您想在途中安静地坐着休息，公交车并不是一个好选择。

segments.text: And another thing is, before you jump on the bus, enquire of the driver about where the bus will go.
segments.translation: 还有一点，上车前要向司机询问公交车开往哪里。

segments.text: Unlike most cities, here in Muna Island, you cannot find the destination shown in front of the bus or at the bus stop.
segments.translation: 与大多数城市不同，在穆纳岛，您无法在公交车前方或公交站看到目的地信息。

segments.text: Maybe you've found the bus service is not so enjoyable, in that case, you can always rent a car.
segments.translation: 或许您已经发现公交服务不太舒适，这种情况下，您随时可以租车。

segments.text: If you choose this way, I advise you to prepare well beforehand.
segments.translation: 如果选择这种方式，我建议您事先做好充分准备。

segments.text: Although some taxi companies provide car rental services, many visitors sometimes find nobody answering the phone, so leave this way when you are in a hurry.
segments.translation: 虽然有些出租车公司提供租车服务，但许多游客有时会发现电话无人接听，所以着急时不要采用这种方式。

segments.text: It's wise to compare several car rental companies online beforehand, as the price may vary a lot.
segments.translation: 最好事先在网上比较几家汽车租赁公司，因为价格可能相差很大。

segments.text: Booking via hotel may be overcharged, as it contains a 10% commission, so it's also not advisable.
segments.translation: 通过酒店预订可能会被多收费，因为其中包含10%的佣金，所以也不建议这样做。

segments.text: More importantly, don't forget to check with the company what the price covers in detail, like daily rental expenses, car insurance, commission etc.
segments.translation: 更重要的是，别忘了向公司详细确认价格包含哪些项目，例如每日租金、汽车保险、佣金等。

segments.text: It usually includes unlimited mileage too, but fuel is excluded.
segments.translation: 价格通常还包括不限里程，但不包括燃油费。

segments.text: If you don't want to drive, a taxi is the quickest and most comfortable way, although few are available on Muna Island.
segments.translation: 如果您不想开车，出租车是最快、最舒适的出行方式，尽管穆纳岛上的出租车很少。

segments.text: If you want to find a taxi quickly, it's not a good idea to reserve through the taxi company, as sometimes you'll have quite a wait, especially in the rush hour.
segments.translation: 如果想尽快找到出租车，通过出租车公司预约并不是好办法，因为有时要等很久，尤其是在高峰时段。

segments.text: The easiest way is just waving your hands on the street to stop the taxi.
segments.translation: 最简单的办法就是在街上挥手拦车。

segments.text: Otherwise, the driver will drive away directly after he drops off the guests.
segments.translation: 否则，司机送下乘客后会直接开走。

segments.text: Oh, another thing is, I have to remind you that there is no meter for taxis in Muna Island, so before you jump in the taxi, you'd better negotiate with the driver about how much you're going to pay.
segments.translation: 哦，还有一点我必须提醒大家，穆纳岛的出租车没有计价器，所以在上车前，最好先和司机谈妥车费。

segments.text: For example, if you take a taxi from the airport at night, it may cost you.
segments.translation: 例如，如果您夜间从机场乘坐出租车，可能会花费……

segments.text: So, confirm the price before you get in.
segments.translation: 所以，上车前要确认好价格。

segments.text: OK, that's all about the tips for Muna Island that I want to share today.
segments.translation: 好的，以上就是我今天想和大家分享的穆纳岛旅行注意事项。

segments.text: And are there any questions?
segments.translation: 大家有什么问题吗？
